message.content:
(1) Yes, the page is titled "STAGE 14.5 – PRODUCTION CERTIFICATION".  
(2) Yes, there is a hero score ring showing "85.5% OVERALL" with "2 critical · 3 warnings".  
(3) Yes, there is a "VERDICT" label with "X NOT CERTIFIED" and "FAIL".  
(4) Yes, there are 8 module cards (Module 1 to Module 8).  
(5) Yes, there is an "EXIT CRITERIA" sidebar listing requirements (e.g., "All 10 must pass to advance to Stage 15", "Full regression suite passes", etc.).  

Visible elements verbatim:  
- "STAGE 14.5 – PRODUCTION CERTIFICATION"  
- "Institutional acceptance gate before Stage 15 (Report Engine)"  
- "Run Full Certification" button, "reset" link  
- "VERDICT" section with "X NOT CERTIFIED", "FAIL"  
- "Build athx-14.2.0+sha.7c9e3a1 · valid until 7/18/2026, 11:40:30 PM"  
- "MODULES 7 / 8", "PASSING 2 / 7", "EXIT CRITERIA 10 / 10"  
- "Download Production Certificate (PDF)" button  
- "CERTIFICATION MODULES" section with "Click any module to drill into detailed checks"  
- 8 module cards (Module 1: Data Certification, Module 2: Intelligence Certification, Module 3: Forecast Certification, Module 4: Decision Certification, Module 5: Stress Testing, Module 6: Replay Certification, Module 7: Performance Certification, Module 8: Production Certificate)  
- "EXIT CRITERIA" sidebar with items like "All 10 must pass to advance to Stage 15", "Full regression suite passes", "Live data stable for ≥ 1 trading session", etc.
